fault_hypothesis: The function truncates floating-point shares to integers on line 29, causing the sum of allocations to be less than the total when fractional parts are discarded.

constraints.intent: The sum of the final integer shares must equal the original total.

spec.expr: not floor_to_int or sum(int(v) for v in shares__1) == total

constraints.intent: The sum must be preserved even after the planned integer truncation.

spec.expr: not floor_to_int or abs(sum(v % 1 for v in shares__1)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: Truncation to integer is only valid if the total fractional part is zero.
The sum of returned allocations must equal the total if integer conversion was done.
